channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This US start-up wants to pay you to host a data center on the side of your home — and says it won't disturb you at all
item.description: SPAN plans installing residential AI computing nodes outside homes, offering subsidized electricity and internet access to participating homeowners.

item.title: The haves and have nots of the AI gold rush
item.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

item.title: How to watch Preakness Stakes 2026: live stream horse racing online from anywhere
item.description: Here's how you can watch Preakness Stakes 2026 live streams online and from anywhere in the world, as Laurel Park hosts the The Run for the Black-Eyed Susans.

item.title: The future of Army rations? US investigates 'alternative protein technologies' to keep soldiers fed in the field — hopefully it will be more appealing than it sounds
item.description: US Army studies alternative protein rations using gels, powders, and fermentation methods to reduce weight while maintaining soldier nutrition requirements

item.title: Marketing operating system Nectar Social raises $30M Series A led by Menlo
item.description: AI-powered marketing platform Nectar Social announced Thursday that it raised a $30 million Series A round led by Menlo Ventures and its Anthology Fund, which was created alongside Anthropic.

item.title: SpaceX is reportedly getting ready to go public as early as June
item.description: Reuters reported that SpaceX could make the initial announcement by next Wednesday.
